title: biscutella coronopifolia subsp. mediterranea
intro: Biscutella coronopifolia subsp. mediterranea, also known as Mediterranean crosswort, is a plant species belonging to the family Brassicaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Biscutella coronopifolia subsp. mediterranea include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
